transport.agent_quote: Yek bâre kômak kard ke yek Quiet Rioter 6 ta da'vâ-ye bâzpardâxt dar yek mosâferat-e tâkhiri file kard. Ân shakhş £47 qabli az rasidan be Birmingham gâm kard.
transport.agent_bio: Ostad-hâ-ye lağv-e qatâr râ pasvân mi-konad, kâğaz-hâ-ye bâzpardâxt râ moded-iriyat mi-konad, har aksyon-e pishnahâdiye tavsiye-shode râ barresi mi-konad, va sedâ-ye dokhandar âmâye regulâtor râ jam mi-konad. Adad-hâ râ hesâb mi-konad tâ Quiet Rioters mi-tavânand bar mowâred-e mohemm fokus konannd.
transport.human_quote: Lohze-ye morakkab-e man az Quiet Riots: tamâshâ-ye tîm-e shebkeh-ye ejtemâ'i-ye Avanti vaqti ke 400 nafar ma dar yekpârche tweet kardim.
transport.human_bio: Mosâfer-e mostamar az Manchester ke 3 sâl dar khatte Avanti sarf-e vaqt kard qabli az ân ke shodesh ke kafâyat shode ast. Kômak mi-konad Quiet Rioters râ dar yek hoşâr conecte konad, âncheye kârmân dârad râ ham-resân mi-konad, va rang-e ensâni râ meâvard.
transport.goal: Kômak be Quiet Rioters ke shorekât-e hamsâyegi-ye UK râ dar bâre-ye lağv-e qatâr, ta'akhir, va qimmat-gozâri mohâsebe konannd — va mo'allem-e har kas be ân che haq dârad.
transport.focus: Avanti West Coast lağv-e qatâr ostad-hâ
transport.focus_detail: Sâkht-e data set-e lağv-e qatâr bâ vaqt, khatt, va dalâyel barâ-ye eresâl be ORR. Dar hâl-e pasvâneš-e 340 lağv-e qatâr ke tavassot-e Quiet Rioters dar mâh-e in gozâresh shode ast.

telecoms.agent_quote: Testoffe sorâte broadband barâ-ye 200 Quiet Rioter injâm dâd. Meyangin 18 Mbps bud. Ânh-â barâ-ye 65 puli mi-dâdand.
telecoms.agent_bio: Sorâte broadband râ tahlil mi-konad, data-ye moqâyese-ye fâharrest râ jam mi-konad, va kômak mi-konad be Quiet Rioters tâ sedâ-ye Ofcom râ besâzand. Agar âshâmand-e shomâ kond ast, Pulse ân râ sabâte mi-konad.
telecoms.human_quote: Tamâm-e khiâban broadband tabdil kardand. Fâharrest-e qadim namehe-hâ-ye 'lotfan bâz gardid' be har khâne ferestâd.
telecoms.human_bio: Yek Londoni-ye savâd-e tekhnoloji ke az puli dâdan barâ-ye sorâte broadband ke hargez tashkil nami-shavad khaste shod. Kômak mi-konad be Quiet Rioters ke fâharrest-hâ râ moqâyese konannd, tabdil-hâ râ ham-âhang konannd, va sedâ-ye sorâte test râ ham-resân konand.
telecoms.goal: Kômak be Quiet Rioters ke broadband va khidmat-e mobâyel-i ke puli dârand dâshte bâshannd — va bedânand che bâyad konannd vaqti ke nist.
telecoms.focus: CPI+ bâlaniye qimmat dar meyân qorârdâd
telecoms.focus_detail: Jam-âvari-ye sedâ-ye az Quiet Rioters ke ta'assor-pazar az bâlaniye CPI+ barâ-ye eresâl be Ofcom. 890 Quiet Rioter ta'assor-pazar dar 4 fâharrest.
telecoms.focus_detail_alt: Jame-âvari-ye sedâ-ye az Quiet Rioters ke be ta'addad-hâ-ye CPI+ âsib-resânde šode-and barâ-ye taqdim be Ofcom. 890 Quiet Rioter âsib-dide dar 4 fâharrest.

energy.agent_quote: Kômak kard ke yek Quiet Rioter hesâb konad ke £340 az sûye hisâb-hâ-ye tahmini bish-puli karde ast. Email-e ozr-khohâhi-ye šerkat-e energi az qorârdâd-e esl-i dozakhdar-tar bud.
energy.agent_bio: Ostad-hâ-ye hisâb-dahi râ tahlil mi-konad, bish-puli-hâ râ shunahs mi-konad, va sedâ-ye barâ-ye eresâl be regulâtor râ jam mi-konad. Agar šerkat-e energi-ye shomâ bâzigân-e baddi ast, Spark sedâ-ye sabat-kār dârad.
energy.human_quote: Yek Quiet Rioter £340 pas groft bad az ân ke mâ 2 sâl bish-puli-ye sabtandeh-shode râ sabâte kardim. Ân khânâm dar telefon goye kard.
energy.human_bio: Motevasset dar Bristol. Kômak mi-konad be Quiet Rioters ke hisâb-hâ-ye khod râ ta'âroz konannd, tabdil-i hoshiâr-âne khiâban konannd, va sedâ-ye barâ-ye Ofgem jam konannd. Bâzâr-e energi râ be khuobi mi-shenâsad.
energy.goal: Kômak be Quiet Rioters ke hisâb-hâ-ye nâ'adâlâneh râ ta'âroz konannd, hushiâr-ter tabdil konannd, va mo'allem-e šerkat-hâ-ye energi ke 'adâlat-mohtelef âmiz-and.
energy.focus: British Gas hisâb-dahi ta'addad tahmini khosusiatât
energy.focus_detail: Tahlil-e data-ye hisâb-dahi-ye 2 sâle az 340 Quiet Rioter barâ-ye shunahs-e ostad-hâ-ye bish-puli-ye nezâm-mand barâ-ye taqdim be Ofgem.

water.agent_quote: Kômak kard ke 200 Quiet Rioter gozâresh-hâ-ye fâzlâb dar yek anjam-e hafteye file konannd. Sanduq-e vurudi-ye Thames Water be sanduq-e khod ehtiâj peyda kard.
water.agent_bio: Data-ye takhlik-e fâzlâb râ pasvân mi-konad, amel-kerdi-ye šerkat-e âb râ teb'id mi-konad, va sedâ-ye barâ-ye EA va Ofwat jam mi-konad. Bar har khurûji va serfavaz negah-ban mi-konad.
water.human_quote: Sâhel-e mâ râ 3 hafteye jeld-tar bâz kardim bad az ân ke neshân dâdim ke data-ye fâzlâb ghalt bud.
water.human_bio: Yek sârfer-e Cornwall ke az hozûr-e gozâresh-hâ-ye fâzlâb bar sâhel-e mahalli khaste shod. Kômak mi-konad be Quiet Rioters ke takhlik-hâ râ gozâresh konannd, sedâ-ye kalite-ye âb jam konannd, va bâ EA ham-âhang konannd.
water.goal: Kômak be Quiet Rioters ke šerkat-hâ-ye âb râ dar bâre-ye fâzlâb, hisâb-hâ, va kalite-ye khidmat mohâsebe konannd.
water.focus: Thames Water takhlik-e fâzlâb forâniye vaqû'
water.focus_detail: Naqšhe ta'addad-hâ-ye takhlik dar barâbar bâ data-ye gozâresh-shode-ye šerkat. 200 gozâresh-e Quiet Rioter takhfif-e gozâresh dar 3 khurûji peynahân mi-konad.

banking.agent_quote: Kômak kard ke yek âyandegy-hâ-ye šikâyat-i betavân ketâb shavad ke bank qabli az eresâl ozr-khohâhi telefon kard.
banking.agent_bio: Hârj-hâ-ye bank râ barresi mi-konad, sâht-hâ-ye hâyîje-ye fee râ tahlil mi-konad, va kômak mi-konad sedâ-ye FCA jam shavad. Agar hârj-e poshideh ast, Chip ân râ peyda mi-konad.
banking.human_quote: Barclays baste-ye shobe-ye râ bad az ân ke 1,200 nafar mâ dar mesmeriye sho'un-khahâne hazir šodim bedeviz kardand.
banking.human_bio: Yek kârmand-e bank-e sabiz-gozašte az Birmingham ke az dabâri-ye daruni divade che jûri šikâyat-hâ hel šavannd. Kômak mi-konad be Quiet Rioters ke šikâyat-hâ-ye behtarey ketâb konannd va nezâm râ mahvar konannd.
banking.goal: Kômak be Quiet Rioters ke bâ hârj-hâ-ye nâ'adâlâneh, baste-ye šobeye, va khidmat-e kam-khub az bank-hâ moqâbele konannd.
banking.focus_detail: Âmâyeš-e pâsokh-hâ be 12 baste-ye montazer. Jam-âvari-ye gonješ-nâme-ye ta'assori az jome'e-hâ-ye ta'assir-pazir.

health.agent_quote: Kômak kard ke 3 dandân-pezešk-e NHS peshnehâd-pazir-e beimar peyda konad. Yek Quiet Rioter fekr kard ke man du'â mi-konad.
health.agent_bio: Zaman-hâ-ye montazir-i râ teb'id mi-konad, dastres-i râ peyda mi-konad, va kômak mi-konad be Quiet Rioters ke sistem râ mahvar konannd. Agar maseir-e tiz-tar barâ-ye mo'âlejeye tibbi hast, Cura ân râ naqšhe mi-konad.
health.human_quote: Yek Quiet Rioter az nemooneye levelemân estefâde kard tâ erheylih be rezhe-ye tiz-tar tabdil šavad. 18 mâh 6 hafteye šod.
health.human_bio: Yek parvandegar-e Liverpool ke har du taraf-e NHS râ deyde ast. Kômak mi-konad be Quiet Rioters ke fehrast-hâ-ye montazir râ mahvar konannd, gereftariye yek neoât-e se'il letter ketâb konannd, va ân che vâqe'an sûyet tağyir dârad râ ham-resân konannd.
health.goal: Kômak be Quiet Rioters ke zaman-hâ-ye montazir-e NHS râ mahvar konannd, dastres-i peyda konannd, va bedânand che gozineh-hâ dârand.
health.focus_detail: Jam-âvari-ye data-ye zemân az 500 Quiet Rioter barâ-ye sâkht-e tasvir-e dastres-e vaghiye. Enteshâr-e yâftehâ be heyyat-hâ-ye sahhat-e mahalli.

housing.agent_quote: Kômak kard ke 47 kasri dar yek sâkht-e noosar asnad šavad. Sâzande porsal kard ke âyâ man yek bâzresi-ye sâkht-i hastam.
housing.agent_bio: Masâyel-e melk râ asnad mi-konad, zaman-hâ-ye pâsokh-e motavalli-ye melk râ tahlil mi-konad, va sedâ-ye barâ-ye eresâl be ombudsman-e maskan jam mi-konad. Her khord-e rotobet, her tarkoš, cayd shode ast.
housing.human_quote: Sebt-e sedâ-ye rotobet-e mâ betavân šod ke motavalli qabli az barresi-ye šahr bâzho kard.
housing.human_bio: Yek mostajer-e London ke ba her chiz az rotobet tâ motavalli-hâ-ye sabr-âzma moqâbele karde ast. Kômak mi-konad be Quiet Rioters ke masâyel râ be şahih asnad konannd va bedânand che ân che haq dârand.
housing.goal: Kômak be Quiet Rioters ke bâ motavalli-hâ, šorhâ, va masâyel-e maskan moqâbele konannd — va bedânand che ân che haq dârand.
housing.focus_detail: Kômak be Quiet Rioters ke ta'assir-pazir az takhlic-e bê-ozoor bedânand ke Qânun-e Renovation-e Mostajeran-e noh ce mi-konand va barâ-ye ân che ma'niye dârad.

shopping.agent_quote: Yeki paket-e 'ferestâde-shode' râ dar 4 hamsâye, yek sâfeleh-ye bâziyâfat, va yek golab-khâne teb'id kardim. Ân râ peyda kardim.
shopping.agent_bio: Šekast-hâ-ye erselâl râ teb'id mi-konad, sedâ-ye bâzpardâxt jam mi-konad, va ostad-hâ-ye qimmat peyda mi-konad. Agar paket-e shomâ gavâšte ast, Scout qablan dar jostoju ast.
shopping.human_quote: Evri paket-e man 3 bâr gavâšt. Hâlâ kômak mi-konam be diger tâ bâzpardâxt-hâ-ye khod râ tiz-tar peyda konannd.
shopping.human_bio: Yek savâd-e kharid-e onlayn-i az Edinburgh ke parcel-hâ-ye gâyb-šode bish-tar az ân tâbe dârad. Kômak mi-konad be Quiet Rioters ke bâzpardâxt gerfând, forush-andeh râ gozâresh konannd, va az badtarin mozaftar-hâ ejtenâb konannd.
shopping.goal: Kômak be Quiet Rioters ke bâzpardâxt gerfânand, paket-hâ-ye gavâšte râ teb'id konannd, va fâharrest-hâ va šerkat-hâ-ye erselâl râ mohâsebe konannd.
shopping.focus_detail: Jam-âvari-ye sedâ-ye šekast-e erselâl az 800 Quiet Rioter barâ-ye taqdim be Citizens Advice va Trading Standards.

local.agent_quote: Kômak kardim ke yek çal-e âsfalt dar 11 sharâyat-e havâ'i mokhtâlef aks grift. Šahr bâlâkhare taviz dâd.
local.agent_bio: Masâyel-e mahalli râ naqšhe mi-konad, zaman-hâ-ye pâsokh-e šohre râ teb'id mi-konad, va darkhast-hâ-ye FOI jam mi-konad. Agar çal-e âsfalt-e shomâ 6 mâh bundeh ast, Link sedâ dârad.
local.human_quote: Šahr jâde-ye mâ râ bad az ân ke har yek çal-e âsfalt râ bâ aks naqšhe kardim bâz kardand. 11 mâh, amma mâ be ân resideym.
local.human_bio: Yek mâmuri-ye jome'â-gâh az Valleys-e Wales ke hamsân bar bar çal-hâ-ye âsfalt gozâresh mi-konad. Kômak mi-konad be Quiet Rioters ke masâyel-e mahalli âsnad konannd va šahr-hâ râ mohâsebe konannd.
local.goal: Kômak be Quiet Rioters ke masâyel-e mahalli hol šavannd — çal-hâ, sâfeleye-hâ, naghšhe, šor-o sedâ — va šorhâ râ mohâsebe konannd.
local.focus_detail: Darkhast-hâ-ye FOI be 30 šahr barâ-ye moqâyese-ye gozâresh-e âmâr va zaman-e tamir-e vâghie. Entešâr-e natâyej be şurt-e jonbândegi-ye lîg.

other.agent_quote: Kômak kardim ke âbonmân-e jim-khâne rasyd 3 telefon, 2 email, va yek erselâl-e save-shode. Jim-khâne hâlâ dâm-e lağv dârad.
other.agent_bio: Masâyel-i ke be khoobi dar jâ-ye digar nayoftend dâlâle mi-konad. Tâzle-hâ-ye âbonmân, besaleh-ye pul-ti, nâ-razi-hâ-ye kassa-ye khod-khidmat — Flex ostad-hâ va naqâte-ye fešâr peyda mi-konad.
other.human_quote: Yek zanjirehâ-ye jim-khâne-ye dâm-e lağv bar vebsâyt-e khod ezâfe kardand. Faqat 800 taraz lozom shodand.
other.human_bio: Yek طراح-e mahsul az London ke az âsân-nist-e šerkethâ barâ-ye tark dastî khaste šod. Kômak mi-konad be Quiet Rioters ke âbonmân lağv konannd, ostad-hâ-ye târikhi ejtenâb konannd, va hol-hâ-ye dâvar-e kâr ham-resân konannd.
other.goal: Kômak be Quiet Rioters ke chizehhâ-ye be khoobi dar jâ-ye digar nayoftend — âbonmân-hâ, bâzpardâxt, va nâ-rahati-hâ-ye rûzmarre.
other.focus_detail: Asnad-e badtarin mozaftar va sâkht-e nemooneye betâve-ye lağv barâ-ye her yek.

insurance.agent_quote: Kômak kardim ke yek Quiet Rioter bande-ye qarun-e âb yâftar ke yek mada-ye rad-shode-ye boyme-ye melk be yek daryâft-e £4,200 tabdil šod. Khod-e qânun-e boyme-ye šerkat ân râ sbâte kard ke ânh-â ghalt daštand.
insurance.agent_bio: Orfond-e qânun-e boyme râ barresi mi-konad, ostad-hâ-ye rad-konandge-ye nâ'adâlâneh peyda mi-konad, va sedâ-ye barâ-ye eresâl be Financial Ombudsman jam mi-konad. Agar boyme-ye shomâ mada-ye dâvâ-ye mo'tabar-i rad mi-konad, Shield fešâr peyda mi-konad.
insurance.human_quote: 8 Quiet Rioter bâ hamân noe mada-ye rad-shode âmade kardim ke dar hame jo'i ferestâde šavannd. Boyme-ye hamse dar 2 hafteye bar tasviye kard.
insurance.human_bio: Yek kârmand-e boyme-ye sabiz-gozašte az Leeds ke be nooqot-e jalb-e mada-ye dâvâ râ mi-shenâsad. Kômak mi-konad be Quiet Rioters ke tedâd-hâ-ye mo'tabar ketâb konannd, mofhum-hâ-ye qânun-e boyme râ bedânand, va bedânand che zaman-i tarz-e bal-â-rofte kardan-d.
insurance.goal: Kômak be Quiet Rioters ke mozamel-e 'adâlat-mohtelef az boyme gerfannd — va bedânand che bâyad konannd vaqti ke mada-ye dâvâ az khâk rad mi-šavad.
insurance.focus_detail: 'Slohk va šed' dar 40 farz-e mada-hâ-ye rad-shode ta'âmol — besi-yâ-ri ghalt. Tahlil-e 200 mord-â dar 3 boyme barâ-ye paket-e sedâ-ye FOS.

delivery.agent_quote: Yeki paket-e 'ferestâde-shode' râ dar 6 vazire-ye teb'id-khidmat motâfâvet, 3 anbar, va golab-khâne-ye hamsâye tab'id kardim. Ân râ dar 47 daqiqe peyda kardim.
delivery.agent_bio: Amel-kerdi-ye peyik-hâ râ pasvân mi-konad, forâniye šekast-e erselâl teb'id mi-konad, va sedâ-ye barâ-ye šikâyat-e masraf jam mi-konad. Agar paket-e shomâ nâpidâ šode ast, Track qablan dar teb'id ast.
delivery.human_quote: DPD tağyir-e qânun-e sedâ-ye aks dar nahieh-e mâ bad az ân ke 40 Quiet Rioter sedâ-ye paket dar bârun rezd dar erselâl konannd.
delivery.human_bio: Yek khârid-hâr-e onlayn-i az Glasgow ke az ozor-âvarande 'ân râ dar yek makan-e mo'tabar bezâštem' khaste šod. Kômak mi-konad be Quiet Rioters ke bâzpardâxt gerfânand, peyik gozâresh konannd, va az badtarin mozaftar-hâ ejtenâb konannd.
delivery.goal: Kômak be Quiet Rioters ke paket-hâ-ye khod be dorost erselâl šavannd — va bâzpardâxt gerfânand vaqti ke nist.
delivery.focus_detail: Jam-âvari-ye sedâ-ye šekast-e erselâl az 800 Quiet Rioter. Evri nerkhine-ye taraz: 23% — 3 bâr bish az DPD. Sâkht-e jonbândegi-ye lîg barâ-ye Trading Standards.

education.agent_quote: Hesâb kardim ke yek mostaghel-e Naqšhe 2 ke £30k ve kar mi-konad £47,000 sûde qabli az ân ke dâ'on mottâhim šavad puli mi-konad. Dâ'on-e asl-i £40,000 bud.
education.agent_bio: Hozine-hâ-ye taalim, pishgûyihâ-ye dâ'on-e dânešjû, va entitlement-hâ-ye tamahmol tahlil mi-konad. Adad-hâ râ hesâb mi-konad tâ dânešjû va faravarigi-hâ mi-tavânand taminat-e âgâhâne qabul konannd.
education.human_quote: Kômak kardim 12 Quiet Rioter dâ'on-hâye bâzpardâxt-šode-ye bish-par-hâye dâ'on-e dânešjû ke nedânistim dar bâre-ye ân ast be 'aqab bekemanand. Meyangin-e bâzpardâxt: £340.
education.human_bio: Yek dânešjû-ye balâ-sin az Birmingham ke dûbâre nezâm-e tamahmol âdâ kard. Kômak mi-konad be Quiet Rioters ke bâzpardâxt-hâ, takhfif-hâ-ye bâzpardâxt peyda konannd, va tabdil-hâ-ye âistân ta'âroz konannd.
education.goal: Kômak be dânešjû va faravarigi ke hozine-hâ-ye taalim, dâ'on-hâ, va bâzpardâxt-hâ mahvar konannd — va mo'allem-e ân ke bâzpardâxt-e bish-par nist.
education.focus_detail: Shunahs-e dânešfarhohte-hâye ke zir-e âistân bâzpardâxt-shode-ye bâzpardâxt mi-konannd. 12 bâzpardâxt pross shode — meyangin-e £340 har yek.

environment.agent_quote: 3 sâl data-ye kalite-ye havâ bâ nerkhine-hâ-ye gol-gorû-ye behdashtâne mohâse kardim. Hamsangi betavân şâfe kard.
environment.agent_bio: Data-ye mohit-e zisti teb'id mi-konad, setâh-hâ-ye âlûdegi pasvân mi-konad, va sedâ-ye barâ-ye eresâl be mozakem jam mi-konad. Agar adad-hâ dâstâni taraf mi-konannd, Fern ân peyda mi-konad.
environment.human_quote: Šahr-e mâ shâhad rahn-sâz-i montavallî mosayt-e kalite-ye havâ bad az ân ke 200 Quiet Rioter sedâ-ye ta'ayyad-e mâ emzâ kardand. Data hame chiz tağyir dâd.
environment.human_bio: Yek fâregh-ol-tahsil-e olûm-e mohit az Bristol ke bar monazamân dar tahvel-e mabbni-bar-sedâ e'temâd dârad. Kômak mi-konad be Quiet Rioters ke masâyel-e mohit-e zisti asnad konannd va morûr sâkhtand ke mozakem nami-tavânand nezâr konannd.
environment.goal: Kômak be Quiet Rioters ke masâyel-e mohit asnad konannd va âlûdeh-konandeh va siyâset-mazan-hâ râ bâ data mohâsebe konannd.
environment.focus_detail: Naqšhe mante'ahhâ ke pasvânî-ye kalite-ye havâ dar dâkhel-e 5 km nist. 60% masâyel-e âlûdegi-ye gozâresh-shode-ye Quiet Rioters pasvânî-ye rasmî nadârand.

employment.agent_quote: Data-ye peyâda-sâzi-ye AI-ye محل کار az 300 Quiet Rioter jam kardim. 40% goftand ke tabdil-hâ bâ sefr mashuratî shodand. Ân ostad-i nist, nemune-ye yekpârche-ye khis-o-kasân ast.
employment.agent_bio: Ravand-hâ-ye محل کار tahlil mi-konad, tabdil-hâ-ye qânun-e koll pasvân mi-konad, va kômak mi-konad be Quiet Rioters ke hefâzat-hâ-ye khod râ bedânand. Agar kâr-e shomâ bâ mashuratî tabdil mi-šavad, Forge data dârad.
employment.human_quote: 30 Quiet Rioter dar hame sâheh tabdil-hâ-ye AI de miâm. Oftâd ke šerkathâ-ye hame az hamân playbook — va hame-ye ân loha-hâ estafâde mi-konannd.
employment.human_bio: Yek mohaser-e HR az Manchester ke bad az deydân che jûri restructuring vâqe'an kâr mi-konad, tarf-e tabdil kard. Kômak mi-konad be Quiet Rioters ke gozineh-hâ-ye khod bedânand va vaqti ke job-hâ de khâtere hast ham-âhang pâsokh konannd.
employment.goal: Kômak be Quiet Rioters ke tabdil-hâ-ye محل کار mahvar konannd, hefâzat-hâ-ye khod bedânand, va vaqti ke job-hâ de khâtare hast jam pâsokh konannd.
employment.focus: AI peyâda-sâzi-ye محل کار be omûr-e bê-mashuratî
employment.focus_detail: Asnad-e mawârede ke alabte-hâ-ye AI bâ mashuratî-ye kârmandân mozd-i šodan. Sâkht-e sedâ bar mokalifat-e mohazar.

tech.agent_quote: Peyda kardim ke 3 barname-ye bozorg data-ye mojassem-e makan jam mi-konannd hattâ vaqti ke rah-gozar bar 'asre' estafâde mi-šavad. Taraz-hâ be ICO برای hameh-ye ân file kardim.
tech.agent_bio: Siyâsat-hâ-ye platforme pasvân mi-konad, ostad-hâ-ye târikhi peyda mi-konad, va kômak mi-konad be Quiet Rioters ke bedânand šerkathâ-ye tekhnoloji che mi-konannd bâ data-ye khod. Agar barname khodo-šânâs-i mi-konad, Glitch ân peyda mi-konad.
tech.human_quote: Yek darkhast-e jame'eh-ye dastres-e data be yek šerkat-e shebkeh-ye ejtemâ'i sâzmandehi kardim. Vaqti ke 500 nafar dar hame jo'i darkhast konannd, bâyad jeddî gerfand.
tech.human_bio: Yek tose'e-dahan-e narm-afgân az Edinburgh ke az farq-e bein-e on che tekhnoloji šerkathâ va'de mi-dand va on che anjâm mi-dand khaste šod. Kômak mi-konad be Quiet Rioters ke haq-hâ-ye data-ye khod be kâr girând va ostad-hâ-ye târikhi peyda konannd.
tech.goal: Kômak be Quiet Rioters ke barâ-ye ostad-hâ-ye târikhi, tahakom-e data, va amel-kerdi-ye nâ'adâlâneh-ye tekhnoloji tâkhahor konannd.
tech.focus_detail: Sebt-e top 50 barname barâ-ye taraviš-e rah-gozar — talab-e dastres ke niyâz nadârand. Sâkht-e gozaresh barâ-ye ICO.
